# Step 03: Generate — Create Config File

## Purpose

Generate `.cc-to-codex.yaml` from the user's selections.

## Config Schema

```yaml
# .cc-to-codex.yaml
# Generated by cc-to-codex:sync skill

# "global" — sync ~/.claude only
# Or a project root path (e.g. "/Users/mini/mally") — sync ~/.claude + <project>/.claude
scope: global

exclude:
  # Skill directories to skip (glob patterns supported)
  skills:
    - wf
    - poppy-*

  # Hook files to skip (matched against command string)
  hooks:
    - rtk-rewrite.sh
    - record-surface-session.sh

  # CLAUDE.md sections/references to omit from AGENTS.md
  claude_md_sections:
    - "@RTK.md"
    - "Sub-Agent Policy"
```

## Procedure

1. Build the YAML from collected selections
2. Save location is automatic:
   - `scope: global` → `~/.cc-to-codex.yaml`
   - `scope: <project_root>` → `<project_root>/.cc-to-codex.yaml`
3. Write the file
4. Show the generated content to the user

## Checklist

- [ ] Build YAML from selections
- [ ] Write config file to automatic location
- [ ] Display generated config to user
